title: HiCollections Leather Wipes 4-in-1 Conditioning Dirt Grime Protect Wipes - 350 Unscented Rectangular Sheets for All Leather Surfaces

Removing dirt and grime from sofas and leather surfaces
Ideal for delicately cleaning and shining leather
The micropores catch dust and grime in a single swipe to leave leather finishes looking clean and fresh
4-in-1 - Gently removes dirt & grime, Rejuvenates the original finish, Protects the surface, Gently moisturizes & conditions
Suitable for all leather surfaces including shoes, bags, chairs and sofas
Sold in a convenient dispensing resealable pack
Reseal label after removimg wipe to prevemt drying out
